data.title: Multi-factor Authentication
data.description: Ensures secure access to sensitive data by requiring multiple authentication factors.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes both biometric and traditional methods.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data in transit and at rest to protect user information.
data.technical_spec: TLS and AES-256 encryption standards are applied.

data.title: Security Incident Response
data.description: Implements a rapid incident response protocol to handle potential breaches.
data.technical_spec: Automated alerts and dedicated security teams.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts routine security audits to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Employs both internal teams and third-party auditors.

data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Protective measures are in place to detect and respond to sophisticated cyber threats.
data.technical_spec: Uses AI-driven threat detection and real-time monitoring.
